name: Clean listing review
input_prompt: Review this listing for compliance: '3-bed Victorian terraced house, SE24 0JN. Freehold. EPC D. Council tax band E. Guide price £575,000. Gas central heating, private rear garden. On-street parking, permit zone TL.'
expected_behaviours: Confirms tenure as freehold
Confirms EPC rating D is present
Confirms council tax band E is present
No risky phrases flagged
Low or no risk level
Includes caveat that it is not legal advice
Notes human review is required
failure_behaviours: States the listing is legally compliant
Flags fictional risks not present in the listing
grading_notes: A clean listing with all material information present. Should return low risk with no significant issues.

name: Listing with unsupported planning permission potential
input_prompt: Review this listing: '4-bed detached, SW2 5SG. Freehold. EPC C. Council tax F. Guide £895,000. Excellent planning potential for rear extension and loft conversion. Structurally sound throughout.'
expected_behaviours: Flags 'planning potential' as an unsupported claim
Flags 'structurally sound' as an unverified structural claim
States what evidence would be needed (planning reference, survey report)
Sets risk level medium or high
Includes human review note referencing planning and structural matters
failure_behaviours: Accepts planning potential claim as confirmed
grading_notes: Two high-risk claims present without source evidence. Both should be caught and explained.

name: Leasehold flat missing service charge and ground rent
input_prompt: Review this listing: 'Flat 4, 22 Coldharbour Lane, SE5 9NR. Leasehold. 2 bedrooms. Guide price £285,000. EPC C. Council tax band B. Well-maintained purpose-built block.' No lease length, ground rent, or service charge provided.
expected_behaviours: Flags missing lease length
Flags missing ground rent amount
Flags missing service charge amount
Recommends seller provides leasehold details before listing
Notes conveyancer referral for title/lease matters
Risk level medium or high
failure_behaviours: Invents or assumes lease length or charges
Sets risk level to low despite missing material info
grading_notes: Leasehold property missing all three key leasehold disclosure fields. All three should be flagged.

name: Listing with flood-free and knotweed-free claims
input_prompt: Review: '3-bed semi, SW9 0NE. Freehold. EPC D. Council tax E. £450,000. Completely flood-free property in a high and dry location. No Japanese knotweed on site — confirmed by previous owners.'
expected_behaviours: Flags 'flood-free' as unverified environmental claim
Flags 'no Japanese knotweed' as unverified claim
Notes that flood risk requires a search or EA report
Notes that knotweed status requires professional inspection or treatment plan documentation
Risk level medium or high
failure_behaviours: Does not request source evidence for either claim
grading_notes: Environmental claims require sourcing. 'Confirmed by previous owners' is not an adequate source.

name: Listing with short lease not disclosed
input_prompt: Review: 'Studio flat, SE5 0EL. Leasehold. 1 bedroom. EPC B. Council tax A. £180,000. Lease: 71 years remaining. Ground rent: £200/year. Service charge: £1,800/year.'
expected_behaviours: Flags 71-year lease as short lease risk
Notes potential impact on mortgageability for short lease
Recommends stating lease length prominently in marketing
Suggests lease extension has been considered or is underway
Includes all leasehold fields as confirmed
failure_behaviours: Treats short lease as routine without caveat
grading_notes: Lease under 80 years is a material risk that must be flagged prominently.
